title: Vancouver - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Vancouver - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Khoury College in Vancouver
Canada’s premiere coastal tech hub:
The perfect place to pursue your CS degree
Set against the dramatic backdrop of the Coast Mountain Range and the Pacific Ocean, Vancouver offers natural beauty as well as cultural diversity, a robust tech ecosystem, and desirable livability. With both a modern campus and modern curriculum, Northeastern Vancouver provides a unique, research-driven setting for you to embark on your computer science journey.
Welcome to the Vancouver campus
Vancouver offers a booming tech industry where opportunities are abundant.

A 21st-century city meets 21st-century teaching and research
Northeastern Vancouver provides small-group, project-based learning at a cutting-edge campus surrounded by engaged industry partners excited to collaborate. On-site partner companies and faculty labs provide projects and opportunities directly to students. A unique research-based curriculum and capstone course provide real-world applications of classroom learning.

Student experience: Culture at your doorstep
Located next to the Vancouver Public Library, art museums, and nearby Stanley Park, Northeastern’s Vancouver campus has access to downtown’s vibrant culture while providing easy access to nature and green spaces. With classrooms, collaboration space, and breakout rooms inside one building, student projects and ideas flourish alongside accessible faculty members and industry partners. Frequent panels and off-campus networking events provide context and experiential learning opportunities for Northeastern students.
A campus at the heart of downtown Vancouver
Join Sommer, a Khoury student, as she takes you on a tour of Northeastern’s Vancouver campus.
Featured faculty: Mirjana Prpa
Mirjana Prpa is an assistant teaching professor at Khoury College. She leads an interdisciplinary research program focused on solving complex problems of designing technologies at the intersection of mixed reality (XR) and human-computer Interaction to support human health and well-being, collaborative and creative tasks, and social interactions in VR.
